title: galeopsis pubescens var. mollis
intro: Galeopsis pubescens var. mollis, also known as soft hempnettle, is a perennial herb in the mint family native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Galeopsis pubescens var. mollis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or extracting the plant's oils and essences.
